name: Transfer a Store from a Partner To Customer
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You will need to transfer the ownership of a store before your customer can begin trading and processing orders."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"There are two ways that you can transfer ownership:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Contact Maropost Commerce's sales team who will contact the customer on your behalf to confirm the subscription services."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Add the staff user to the webstore so the client can login. To do this, navigate to "},{"text":"Settings & Tools","bold":true},{"text":" > "},{"text":"Staff Users","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Once this is complete, navigate to the partner portal, navigate to "},{"text":"Partner Tools","bold":true},{"text":" > "},{"text":"View Stores","bold":true},{"text":" and click on the store that you want to transfer over to the customer."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Partner Checklist"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Navigate to Addon’s and uninstall any addon’s and features that are not required for launch. Common addon’s that are removed are:"}]},{"type":"code_block","children":[{"type":"code_line","children":[{"text":"        Maropost Commerce Cloud POS        Maropost Commerce Cloud eCommerce        Maropost Commerce Cloud Channels        Maropost Commerce Cloud Ship        Maropost Commerce Cloud Pick n Pack        Customer Groups        Batch Processing        Pricing Promotions        Order Custom Fields        Bulk Combine Orders"}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Add the staff user to the webstore so the client can login. To do this, navigate to "},{"text":"Settings & Tools","bold":true},{"text":" > "},{"text":"Staff Users","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Send the control panel details to the client, and get them to \"manage password\" to set their password."}]}]}]
